A calm wellness area for rest, warmth, recovery, and private time with family or friends.
Hammam is a traditional warm steam experience with gentle heat and high humidity. It helps guests slow down, relax the body, and enjoy a quiet wellness ritual.
Dry sauna is a classic wellness option with high temperature and low humidity. It is suitable for guests who enjoy deep warmth, quiet rest, and a traditional sauna atmosphere.
Wet sauna combines warmth with higher humidity. It creates a softer sauna feeling and is a good choice for guests who prefer steam, gentle heat, and a relaxing rhythm.
Warm pool or hydromassage area may be available
Cold plunge pool may be available
Prices, capacity, and extra guest fees may vary by business. Please confirm details before booking.
